title: SOAR Playbook entry
description: One Cortex XSOAR out-of-the-box playbook from the demisto/content repo (MIT). The EMBEDDED `content` is a reviewed description of what the playbook does (so semantic search matches intent); the raw playbook YAML is kept in `raw_yaml`. Dual-labeled by product/pack origin and investigation-type/use-case. Guardian's agent searches this to find response playbooks and, later, as worked examples for building playbooks.

content.description: The embedded description (what the playbook does, inputs/outputs, integrations used, product/use-case).

raw_yaml.description: The full playbook YAML — kept, NOT embedded.

product.description: Product/vendor (pack author) — AXIS A of the dual label.

tags.description: product:* / support:* / investigation-type slugs — AXIS B of the dual label, UI-filterable.
